criteria_results.description: POST /api/auth/register creates an entry in data/users.json with a bcrypt-hashed passwordHash field (starts with '$2b$') and returns HTTP 201 with {id, username}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 18-34) calls bcrypt.hash(password, 10) before storage.createUser. server/fileStorage.ts (lines 68-79) saves the user object including passwordHash to users.json.

criteria_results.description: GET /api/auth/me returns HTTP 401 with no session cookie, and HTTP 200 with {id, username} after POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials sets a session.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 56-61) implements the GET endpoint with req.isAuthenticated() check. server/auth.ts configures passport-local and session management.

criteria_results.description: GET /api/projects as user A does not return user B's project unless B's project has A's userId in its sharedWith array in data/projects.json.
criteria_results.evidence: server/fileStorage.ts (lines 87-91) filters projects in listProjectsForUser based on ownerId or sharedWith array membership.

criteria_results.description: PUT /api/projects/:id writes a valid JSON file to data/project-states/{id}.json containing a 'layers' array key and no 'pdfFile' key.
criteria_results.evidence: shared/schema.ts (lines 24-31) defines projectStateSchema with 'layers' and without 'pdfFile'. server/fileStorage.ts (line 130) writes this JSON to disk.

criteria_results.description: POST /api/files accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file', saves the binary to data/files/{fileId}, writes metadata JSON to data/files/{fileId}.meta.json, and returns {fileId, url}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 119-125) handles the upload using multer and calls storage.saveFile. server/fileStorage.ts (lines 134-147) saves both binary and metadata files.

criteria_results.description: client/src/App.tsx renders AuthPage when useCurrentUser() returns null and renders the editor Router when user is non-null.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/App.tsx (lines 33-53) contains the conditional logic to render AuthPage/Redirect or the authenticated Router.

criteria_results.description: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts exports useAutoSave() that guards on docState.projectId !== null before calling PUT /api/projects/:id, with a debounce delay of 2000ms.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts has the guard at line 12 and the 2000ms delay at line 36.

criteria_results.description: DocumentState in client/src/lib/types.ts contains projectId: string|null, pdfFileId: string|null, and overlayPdfFileId: string|null fields.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts (lines 48-50) defines these fields as string | null.

suggestions: Consider adding a mechanism to clean up orphaned files in data/files/ if a project or project state reference is deleted.
next_focus: The implementation meets all criteria for server-side project storage and authentication.
